diagram_title: Webapp Voice Input MVP — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Webapp Session Surface
systems.description: Browser-based session UI where users compose and submit prompts.

systems.name: Browser Speech Recognition Runtime
systems.description: Native browser speech recognition capability exposed via SpeechRecognition or webkitSpeechRecognition.

containers.name: App Frontend
containers.description: Solid.js webapp prompt UI and client state.

components.name: Prompt Input Component
components.description: Owns the session prompt editor, footer actions, submit flow, and voice-input UI integration.

components.name: Speech Helper
components.description: Wraps browser speech recognition lifecycle and exposes supported, recording, committed, and interim states.

components.name: Prompt State Context
components.description: Canonical prompt parts/state surface consumed by the prompt editor and submit flow.

components.name: Runtime Adapter Helper
components.description: Resolves browser-specific SpeechRecognition constructors with compatibility checks.

relationships.description: Starts, stops, and reads speech recognition state
Commits recognized transcript into canonical prompt state
